hero.title: Hi, I am {{name}}.
hero.subtitle: Informatics Engineering student specializing in Web and Mobile development, blending robust engineering with user-centric UI/UX design.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: Currently a 2nd-year Informatics Engineering student at Electronic Engineering Polytechnic Institute of Surabaya(EEPIS). I am passionate about transforming complex challenges into efficient, high-impact digital solutions.
about.p2: I don't just write code; I build experiences. My focus is on developing performant, clean, and maintainable applications that solve real-world problems.
about.p3: I thrive in collaborative environments, prioritizing teamwork and collective growth. By implementing Agile principles, I ensure a transparent and adaptive development process that delivers consistent value to both users and clients.

projects_page.title: My Projects
projects_page.subtitle: A collection of projects built with current industry-standard technologies.
